message:
Command `# Still initializing OpenROAD for step 32. STA-0441 warnings appearing again.
# The last STA-0441 output means OpenROAD just finished loading and is about to start GRT.
# Check if GRT started
wc -c /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting/openroad-globalrouting.log 2>/dev/null
tail -10 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/flow.log 2>/dev/null | grep -E "GRT|INFO|ERROR|Running" | tail -5` executed with exit code 0.
